Pope Leo XIV (@Pontifex)

In the dramatic circumstances of war, information must guard against the risk of turning into propaganda. It is every journalist's duty to verify the news, so as not to become a megaphone for power. They must show the suffering that war always brings to populations, which entails showing the face of war and recounting it through the eyes of victims.



— https://nitter.net/Pontifex/status/2033528712117817757#m

Deport them.


One America News (@OANN)

“I think people who are here on refugee status that are involved in this [Minnesota] fraud SHOULD BE DEPORTED.”

Minnesota Senate candidate @Highway_30 argues Somali fraudsters who stole American taxpayer dollars must be expelled from the country

One America News (@OANN)

“[Iran] has control of the Strait of Hormuz and we have seen at least 10 tankers have been hit with drones… So they’re in a position to really control what goes in and out of there… They could blanket the place with these drones.”

AntiWar.com news editor and AntiWar news host @DeCampDave warns the Iranian regime currently controls the Strait of Hormuz—giving the regime massive leverage over global markets.

“Even the donor class has taken notice of this. If they don’t get the SAVE America Act passed and to the president’s desk, there will be a problem.”

Former President Trump Chief of Staff @MarkMeadows warns a political reckoning is coming if the GOP-controlled Senate fails to pass the SAVE America Act.

Yaakov Katz (@yaakovkatz)

At the end of the 12-day war in June, the @IDFSpokesperson said the military had destroyed about 80% of Iran’s missile launchers, leaving roughly 100-150.

Two weeks ago, when this war began, the estimate again was that Iran had about 100-150 launchers. Eight days into the war, after nonstop bombing, the IDF was still saying Iran had around 150 launchers. Now, on day 13 of this campaign, we are told Israel has destroyed about 75% of the launchers and that Iran

I pray for the killing to stop.
